error_signature: Wait node remains stuck in a loop
title: Wait node stuck in execution loop
symptom: The Wait node does not complete and keeps looping even after the image generation is done.
not_this_if: Wait node is functioning correctly in other workflows
root_cause: The Wait node may be receiving multiple inputs from the previous node, which it cannot process correctly. This can cause it to remain in a loop if not configured properly.
fix_steps: Identify the Edit Fields node that is causing the issue
Remove the lower Edit Fields node (SelectDream_Vercel)
Test the workflow again to ensure the Wait node completes
agent_instruction: Remove the problematic Edit Fields node to resolve the Wait node loop issue.
